title: Order Fulfillment Officer
description:
Join Our Team as an Order Fulfillment Officer (Maternity Cover)!

We are seeking a dedicated Order Fulfillment Officer to join our team on a maternity cover contract from 15-June to15-December. In this role, you will be responsible for ensuring seamless and efficient processing of customer orders from entry to delivery. Your proactive approach in managing customer inquiries, resolving order-related issues, and coordinating with internal teams will be key to maintaining our high service standards.

To recognize your contribution, a completion bonus equivalent to half a month’s salary will be awarded at the end of the contract.

Key Responsibilities

  • Order Processing: Accurately process customer orders, ensuring smooth execution from entry through fulfillment.
  • Customer Support: Professionally handle inquiries related to product availability, order status, and service issues.
  • Issue Resolution: Address customer concerns, provide timely solutions, and escalate unresolved matters to the appropriate departments.
  • Record Keeping: Maintain precise documentation of orders, transactions, and communications for transparency and efficiency.
  • Collaboration: Work closely with warehouse and logistics teams to ensure timely and accurate dispatch of orders.
  • Relationship Management: Build trust with customers, dealers, and partners through effective communication and support.
  • Process Optimization: Identify opportunities to streamline fulfillment processes for enhanced accuracy and efficiency.

Qualifications & Skills

  • At least 1 year of experience in order processing, customer support, or a related field.
  • Minimum A-Level or Diploma in any discipline.
  • Strong communication and interpersonal skills for professional customer interactions.
  • Excellent problem-solving abilities to handle order-related concerns effectively.
  • High attention to detail and accuracy in processing orders and documentation.
  • Ability to multi-task and thrive in a fast-paced environment.
  • Proficiency in MS Office (Word, Excel) and ERP systems for order management.
  • A proactive, motivated, and team-oriented mindset.

Why Join Us?

  • Dynamic Work Environment: Engage with a diverse team and network with various departments.
  • Professional Growth: Opportunities for career advancement and professional development.
  • Supportive Culture: A collaborative and supportive work environment that values your contributions.
  • Impactful Role: Be a key player in ensuring customer satisfaction and loyalty.
  • Innovative Company: Work with a company that values innovation and excellence.
  • Completion Bonus: Receive a half-month salary bonus upon successful completion of the contract.

📩 If you are ready to take on this exciting challenge and make a positive impact, apply now! Send your resume to aadayo@igus.net. We look forward to welcoming you to our team.

skills.skill: Order Processing and Change Request Management

postedCompany.description:
IGUS SINGAPORE PTE LTD

Plastics for longer life® - Increase the service lives of your machines with plastics


A few facts:

-igus® was founded in 1964

-Locations in 33 countries and partners in another 80 countries

-Currently approx. 2150 employees worldwide

-Between 1500 and 2500 new products every year


Why join us?

Empower Success Together: At igus, we're driven by a shared purpose and guided by PERFFECT principles to enhance motion plastics, boost innovation, and create joy for customers. Join our community, where we prioritize your success, celebrate achievements, and foster a culture of respect and continuous improvement. Together, we'll light up the future of motion plastics.
